name: Iceland
summary: Included, with Greenland, in Professor Webb's tour of forty-eight years before in search of Runic inscriptions which he failed to unearth.
description:
Iceland was one leg of Professor Webb's tour of forty-eight years before the 1908 meeting, undertaken in search of Runic inscriptions.

The inscriptions were never unearthed; it was the Greenland half of the tour that yielded the professor's encounter with the devil-worshipping Eskimo cult.

sources.quote: Professor Webb had been engaged, forty-eight years before, in a tour of Greenland and Iceland in search of some Runic inscriptions which he failed to unearth
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
